---
title: "Hands-0n Exercise 3-A:"
subtitle:  "Programming Interactive Data Visualisation with R"
date: "26 Apr 2026"
date-modified: "last-modified"
editor: visual
execute:
  freeze: auto
  echo: true
  eval: true
  warning: false
---


1 Overview

2 Getting Started

> Installing and loading libraries
> Importing data

3 Data

> summary
> preview

4 Interactive Data Visualization: ggiraph

>tooltip
>onclick
>data_id

> Tooltip aesthetic

5 Interactivity

Hovering mechanism

> Displaying multiple information on tooltip
